overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit futuristic metropolis. The player navigates busy intersections, walks under elevated highways past glowing storefronts, and enters a building with vibrant pink-lit stairwells.

events.description: blue and white pickup truck drives across the intersection from left to right
camera stops behind a traffic pole at the intersection corner

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet intersection then stopping behind a pole to observe traffic

notable_agents.action: blue and white pickup truck driving across the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: red metal box with yellow pedestrian crossing symbol on top
multi-story concrete building with illuminated orange TURBO signage
cluster of colorful neon advertisements on building facades
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a rain-soaked intersection in a futuristic city at night. The camera moves through a crosswalk marked with yellow stripes while a blue pickup truck passes by. Neon billboards illuminate the right side while a building with TURBO signage dominates the center view. The camera stops behind a traffic pole around 8 seconds, observing the wet streets reflecting the vibrant neon lights.

events.description: resumes walking from behind the traffic pole
enters narrower street beneath the elevated overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk and crossing toward the commercial street under the overpass

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt and dark pants walking toward the camera

entered.detail: illuminated storefront sign reading MARMUR above a shop entrance
elevated highway or monorail track casting shadows overhead

segments.scene_description: Leaving the intersection corner, the camera moves toward a narrower commercial street sheltered under an elevated highway. The TURBO building shifts to the right as a new storefront with a MARMUR sign becomes visible ahead. Pedestrians walk toward the camera while the environment becomes more enclosed under the concrete overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with shops and restaurants

events.description: passing by a parked motorcycle with glowing green neon wheel accents

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass past various shop fronts and illuminated signs

entered.detail: blue rectangular sign with white text reading AESCULAPIUS INC
circular pink neon sign depicting a ramen bowl with Japanese characters
futuristic black motorcycle with bright green glowing wheel rims

segments.scene_description: Walking through the covered arcade beneath the highway, the camera passes distinctive storefronts including a medical clinic with an AESCULAPIUS sign and a ramen shop with a circular neon sign. A futuristic motorcycle with glowing green wheels is parked on the left. The MARMUR sign recedes into the distance as the camera moves deeper under the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: main downtown street with towering skyscrapers and billboards

events.description: crossing the street while vehicles pass by in the background
begins turning left toward a building entrance with stairs

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy downtown street and crossing intersections among other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving down the wet street with headlights on

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with distinctive vertical green neon strip lighting
traditional-style red paper lanterns hanging from building awnings
row of shops with illuminated signs and storefronts

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wide downtown street lined with towering skyscrapers. A distinctive building with vertical green neon lights dominates the center background. Red paper lanterns hang on the left as the camera crosses the street among other pedestrians. Vehicles drive by on the wet road as the camera approaches a building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor commercial stairwell with pink neon lighting

events.description: turns left and enters a building from the street level
begins ascending a long flight of concrete stairs

agents.ego_description: turning left into a building and walking up a long flight of stairs illuminated by pink neon

entered.detail: long flight of concrete stairs leading upward into the building
ceiling illuminated with bright magenta and pink neon tube lights
large illuminated billboards with facial images mounted on the walls

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left into a building entrance, leaving the street behind. Inside, a long concrete stairwell stretches upward, bathed in vibrant pink neon light from the ceiling. Illuminated advertisements line the walls as the camera ascends the stairs, transitioning from the open city street to an enclosed, artificially lit interior space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked city intersection through a sheltered commercial district and finally into a neon-lit interior. It begins by crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk beneath glowing billboards and a prominent TURBO sign, pausing briefly by a traffic pole to observe the vibrant reflections on the wet pavement. As the camera leaves the intersection, the environment becomes more enclosed, moving under a concrete elevated highway past a MARMUR storefront and pedestrians. The scene then glides through a covered arcade featuring a medical clinic, a ramen shop, and a motorcycle with glowing green wheels before emerging back into the open air of a wide downtown street lined with skyscrapers and red paper lanterns. Finally, the camera turns away from the towering buildings and traffic to enter a doorway, ascending a long concrete stairwell bathed in intense pink neon light.
